summary: Iteration 22: PillarNavigation Component + Dashboard Enhancements Testing - Backend 100% passed (13/13 notification tests), Frontend 100% passed. All 7 pillar pages have PillarNavigation component working correctly with proper step highlighting, prev/next navigation, and 'Pilar X de 7' indicator. Dashboard Activity Feed and Quick Status sections verified. Notification bell with dropdown working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/notifications - Returns notifications list and unread_count (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/notifications?limit=5 - Respects limit parameter (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/notifications?unread_only=true - Filters unread notifications (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/notifications/preferences - Returns user preferences (200 OK)
Backend: PUT /api/notifications/preferences - Updates preferences and persists (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/notifications/read-all - Marks all as read (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/notifications/{notif_id}/read - Marks single notification as read (200 OK)
Backend: DELETE /api/notifications/{notif_id} - Deletes notification (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/approvals - Creates approval and triggers notification (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/approvals/{id}/action - Action triggers notification (200 OK)
Backend: POST /api/brands/{brand_id}/comments - Comment triggers notification (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/activity - Returns activity feed (200 OK)
Backend: GET /api/brands/{brand_id}/approvals?status=pending - Returns pending count (200 OK)
Frontend: Pillar Start (/pillars/start) - PillarNavigation shows 7 steps, step 1 highlighted as active
Frontend: Pillar Values (/pillars/values) - PillarNavigation shows step 2 highlighted
Frontend: Pillar Purpose (/pillars/purpose) - PillarNavigation shows step 3 highlighted
Frontend: Pillar Promise (/pillars/promise) - PillarNavigation shows step 4 highlighted
Frontend: Pillar Positioning (/pillars/positioning) - PillarNavigation shows step 5 highlighted
Frontend: Pillar Personality (/pillars/personality) - PillarNavigation shows step 6 highlighted
Frontend: Pillar Universality (/pillars/universality) - PillarNavigation shows step 7 highlighted, no next button
Frontend: Clicking 'Valores >' from /pillars/start navigates to /pillars/values
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Atividade Recente' section
Frontend: Dashboard shows 'Status Rapido' section
Frontend: Dashboard shows Pending Approvals card (data-testid='pending-approvals-card')
Frontend: Dashboard shows Notifications card (data-testid='unread-notifs-card')
Frontend: Dashboard shows Naming card that navigates to /naming
Frontend: Header notification bell visible and clickable
Frontend: Notification dropdown opens on bell click
critical_code_review_comments: PillarNavigation.js: Well-structured shared component with proper data-testid attributes for all navigation elements
PillarNavigation.js: Correctly highlights current step with secondary (orange) color and shows completed steps with checkmarks
PillarNavigation.js: Properly hides prev button on first pillar and next button on last pillar
All 7 pillar pages (PillarStart, PillarValues, PillarPurpose, PillarPromise, PillarPositioning, PillarPersonality, PillarUniversality) correctly import and render PillarNavigation
Dashboard.js: Activity Feed and Quick Status sections properly fetch data from backend APIs
Layout.js: Notification bell with dropdown implemented correctly with data-testid attributes
context_for_next_testing_agent: PillarNavigation component fully tested across all 7 pillar pages. Each pillar page has data-testid='pillar-{name}' (e.g., pillar-start, pillar-values). Navigation component has data-testid='pillar-navigation' with step buttons data-testid='pillar-nav-{short}' (S, V, P, Pr, Po, Pe, U). Prev/next buttons have data-testid='pillar-prev' and 'pillar-next'. Dashboard Activity Feed and Quick Status sections working. Notification bell in header works with dropdown. Tutorial modal appears on first login - dismiss by clicking 'Próximo' buttons. Login uses data-testid='login-email-input', 'login-password-input', 'login-submit-btn'.
